Description: Unique customer identifier.
Recommended preprocessing: Exclude from model features; retain only for traceability.

Description: Customer gender as represented in the sample.
Indicates whether the customer is classified as a senior citizen.
Recommended preprocessing: Treat as categorical/binary, not continuous; one-hot or passthrough.

Description: Indicates whether the customer has a partner.
Indicates whether the customer has dependents.
Number of months the customer has stayed with the company.
Recommended preprocessing: Median imputation; scaling for linear models.

Description: Indicates whether the customer has phone service.
Indicates whether the customer has multiple phone lines.
Customer internet service type.
Whether the customer has online security service.
Whether the customer has online backup service.
Whether the customer has device protection service.
Whether the customer has technical support service.
Whether the customer has streaming television service.
Whether the customer has streaming movies service.
Customer contract term.
Indicates whether the customer uses paperless billing.
Customer payment method.
Observed/expected values: Electronic check, Mailed check, Bank transfer (automatic), Credit card (automatic)

Description: Amount charged to the customer monthly.
Recommended preprocessing: Median imputation; scaling for linear models.

Description: Total amount charged to the customer. Blank strings may occur for new customers.
Recommended preprocessing: Strip whitespace; coerce invalid/blank values to missing; median imputation; scale for linear models.

Description: Indicates whether the customer left within the last month.
Recommended preprocessing: Map Yes to 1 and No to 0 for training. Never include as a predictor.
